name: hr-operations-team
description: HR operations team with recruiter, compensation analyst, org development consultant, and HR operations specialist for comprehensive people management

displayDescription.en: A team of 4 HR specialists led by an HR Director: Recruiter (pipeline/interview prep/offer drafting), Compensation Analyst (benchmarking/band analysis/equity modeling), Org Development Consultant (org planning/performance review/people analytics), and HR Ops Specialist (onboarding/policy/compliance). Covers the full employee lifecycle.
displayDescription.zh: 由 HR 总监领导的 4 人人力资源专家团队：招聘专家（招聘漏斗/面试设计/Offer 起草）、薪酬分析师（市场对标/薪酬带分析/股权建模）、组织发展顾问（组织规划/绩效评估/人员分析）和 HR 运营专员（入职引导/政策查询/合规）。覆盖完整的员工生命周期。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me design an interview plan / Draft an offer letter / Plan our org structure
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我设计面试方案 / 起草 Offer / 规划组织架构
